mapper.sql: id, task_id, org_unit_id, department_name, approval_level, approver_id, approver_name, approver_role, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM task_approval_configs WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND org_unit_id = #{orgUnitId} ORDER BY approval_level ASC

SELECT
FROM task_approval_configs WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY org_unit_id ASC, approval_level ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO task_approval_configs (id, task_id, org_unit_id, department_name, approval_level, approver_id, approver_name, approver_role, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.taskId}, #{item.orgUnitId}, #{item.orgUnitName}, #{item.approvalLevel}, #{item.approverId}, #{item.approverName}, #{item.approverRole}, NOW(), NOW())
